title: Validate renamed package, CLI, and grep cleanliness
description: Run focused validation for the renamed package: CLI smoke checks, import checks, test-suite execution, and grep-based assertions that old source/test/doc identifiers are gone from the required scopes.
acceptance_criteria: `uv run takt summary`, `uv run takt bead list --plain`, and `uv run takt run --once` succeed in the migrated repository state or fail only for unrelated pre-existing reasons that are documented.
`python -c "from agent_takt.cli import main"` or equivalent import check succeeds.
`uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q` passes with zero import errors.
Grep verification finds no remaining `codex_orchestrator` references in `src/`, `tests/`, or `docs/`.
Grep verification finds no remaining `uv run orchestrator` in `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, or `docs/`, and no remaining `.orchestrator/` path references in the required source/test/doc scopes.
conflict_risks: The takt entrypoint references agent_takt.cli:main which does not exist yet. Any bead that attempts to install or invoke the package via the new entrypoint will fail until the module rename bead completes. No file-scope conflicts with other beads; only pyproject.toml and apm.yml were touched.
